_about: Current injury and suspension news for active competitions. Per team, a list of absent players with a description and source. The serving layer looks each player up in the fitted PlayerDeltas artifact (built from StatsBomb lineup data) and subtracts their learned attack/defense contribution from their team's effective strength. No tier or multiplier needed — the magnitude comes from the model. Regenerated by scripts/refresh_news.py from a free public injury tracker (Soccer26Live).

France.issue: Knock / Minor ankle injury (possible Grade 1 ankle sprain) (a fitness doubt)

Spain.issue: Calf injury, followed by another muscular injury
